description: Patronus evaluation of v7 FINAL slide (after 7 RL iterations)
image_description: White background. Bold title: 'Blue and Green hydrogen are two low-carbon production methods of H2 with the highest future potential'. Thin dark horizontal divider. Structured comparison table for Grey H2, Blue H2, Green H2 with light blue and green column fills. Numbered footnotes. 'McKinsey & Company 4' footer.

1_white_background.explanation: The image clearly shows a slide with a white background.

2_restrained_color_palette.explanation: Dominant colors are white, black/navy, and grey text. Light blue and light green column fills are restrained accent colors used for differentiation, not 'rainbow effects'.

3_insight_driven_title.explanation: The title states a clear conclusion and insight, rather than being a simple topic label.

4_structured_data_table.explanation: The slide contains a well-structured table. The header area has thin, dark navy lines, fulfilling the requirement for 'navy header borders'.

5_proper_footer.explanation: Footer is correctly formatted with source text (footnotes) on the left and the company branding ('McKinsey & Company') and page number ('4') on the right.

6_clean_typography.explanation: Clear typographic hierarchy: large bold title, distinct headers, smaller body text, and even smaller footnote text.

7_thin_divider_line.explanation: A thin, dark divider line is present directly below the title area, separating it from the table.

8_professional_polish.explanation: Overall design, alignment, spacing, and consistency demonstrate a high level of professional polish, matching the expected quality of a top consulting firm.

summary: ALL 8 criteria PASSED. After 7 RL iterations, the slide matches McKinsey visual style with white background, insight-driven title, structured table with navy headers, proper footer, clean typography, and professional polish.
